title: Redirected Missions
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM MissionRedirected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} mission(s) had their destination station changed mid-flight during the report period. Redirects occur when the issuing faction loses control of the target station due to conflict or expansion — a direct sign that the background simulation shifted around you while you were already en route.
details.help: MissionRedirected fires when a mission's target station changes, typically due to faction conflict state changes. A non-zero count indicates BGS activity affected your missions.

tagLines: Mid-flight mission redirection events recorded. Destination instability attributed to minor faction conflict activity.
Your destination changed while you were flying there. The galaxy didn't ask permission.
Redirected missions are the galaxy's reminder that politics don't wait for your flight plan.
